attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
NPOLS.PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY AS POL_SHIPMENT_KEY
,NPOR.BK_PO_REVISION_NUM_INT AS BK_PO_REVISION_NUM_INT        
,COALESCE( NPOR.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY,- 99998) AS PURCHASE_ORKDER_KEY            
,CAST( ST.NEED_BY_DATE AS DATE)  AS PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_NEED_DT      
,COALESCE(ST.LATEST_EXTERNAL_FLAG,'N') AS CURRENT_RECORD_FLG
,COALESCE(ST.CLOSED_CODE ,'OPEN') AS PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_STATUS_CD
,COALESCE(NPOLS.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-999) AS PD_PO_LINE_KEY
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER               
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS  EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,'I' ACTION_CODE
,'I' DML_TYPE
FROM
(
SELECT
STPOL.NEED_BY_DATE,
STPOL.LATEST_EXTERNAL_FLAG,
STPOL.CLOSED_CODE,
STPOL.LINE_LOCATION_ID,
STPOL.GLOBAL_NAME,
STPOL.PO_HEADER_ID,
STPOL.REVISION_NUM
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_MF_LINE_LOCATIONS_ARCH_ALL STPOL
UNION ALL
SELECT
EXPOL.NEED_BY_DATE,
EXPOL.LATEST_EXTERNAL_FLAG,
EXPOL.CLOSED_CODE,
EXPOL.LINE_LOCATION_ID,
EXPOL.GLOBAL_NAME,
EXPOL.PO_HEADER_ID,
EXPOL.REVISION_NUM
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_LINE_LOCATIONS_ARCH_ALL EXPOL
) ST
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON ( ST.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME )

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT NPOLS
ON ( ST.LINE_LOCATION_ID = NPOLS.SK_PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID_INT
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NPOLS.SS_CD )

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO
ON ( NPO.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT = ST.PO_HEADER_ID
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NPO.SS_CD )

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PO_REVISION NPOR
ON ( NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY = NPOR.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY 
AND ST.REVISION_NUM = NPOR.BK_PO_REVISION_NUM_INT )

SELECT
LINE_LOCATION_ID              	,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE              	,
LAST_UPDATED_BY               	,
PO_HEADER_ID                  	,
PO_LINE_ID                    	,
SHIPMENT_TYPE                 	,
LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             	,
CREATION_DATE                 	,
CREATED_BY                    	,
QUANTITY                      	,
QUANTITY_RECEIVED             	,
QUANTITY_ACCEPTED             	,
QUANTITY_REJECTED             	,
QUANTITY_BILLED               	,
QUANTITY_CANCELLED            	,
UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE         	,
PO_RELEASE_ID                 	,
SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID           	,
SHIP_VIA_LOOKUP_CODE          	,
NEED_BY_DATE                  	,
PROMISED_DATE                 	,
LAST_ACCEPT_DATE              	,
PRICE_OVERRIDE                	,

UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CLASS         	,
ENCUMBER_NOW                  	,

RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG         	,

ORG_ID                        	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY     	,

GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3             	,

QUANTITY_SHIPPED              	,
TAX_USER_OVERRIDE_FLAG        	,

AMOUNT_CANCELLED              	,
AMOUNT_ACCEPTED               	,
AMOUNT_REJECTED               	,

RETROACTIVE_DATE              	,
DROP_SHIP_FLAG                	,
SALES_ORDER_UPDATE_DATE       	,
TRANSACTION_FLOW_HEADER_ID    	,
FINAL_MATCH_FLAG              	,
MANUAL_PRICE_CHANGE_FLAG      	,
SHIPMENT_CLOSED_DATE          	,
CLOSED_FOR_RECEIVING_DATE     	,
CLOSED_FOR_INVOICE_DATE       	,
SECONDARY_QUANTITY_SHIPPED    	,
VALUE_BASIS                   	,
MATCHING_BASIS                	,
PAYMENT_TYPE                  	,
DESCRIPTION                   	,
WORK_APPROVER_ID              	,
BID_PAYMENT_ID                	,
QUANTITY_FINANCED             	,
AMOUNT_FINANCED               	,
QUANTITY_RECOUPED             	,
AMOUNT_RECOUPED               	,
RETAINAGE_WITHHELD_AMOUNT     	,
RETAINAGE_RELEASED_AMOUNT     	,
OUTSOURCED_ASSEMBLY           	,
AMOUNT_SHIPPED                	,
GES_UPDATE_DATE               	,
GLOBAL_NAME                   	,
ACTION_CD                     	,
CREATE_DATETIME               	,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE             
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_MF_LINE_LOCATIONS_ARCH_ALL ST WHERE NOT EXISTS

(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT NPOLS ,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
WHERE ST.LINE_LOCATION_ID = NPOLS.SK_PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID_INT
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NPOLS.SS_CD 
AND ST.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
)
OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC , $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO  WHERE 
NPO.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT = ST.PO_HEADER_ID
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NPO.SS_CD
AND ST.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PO_REVISION NPOR , $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO WHERE 
NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY = NPOR.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY 
AND ST.REVISION_NUM = NPOR.BK_PO_REVISION_NUM_INT
AND ST.PO_HEADER_ID = NPO.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT
)
